title: saudi arabia(general secretariat of the military service council) ransomware incident

victim.name: saudi arabia(general secretariat of the military service council)

extortion.description: The General Secretariat of the Military Service Council in Saudi Arabia is a governmental entity responsible for overseeing policies and regulations related to military personnel. It addresses matters such as recruitment, training, career progression, and welfare of the armed forces. The council ensures the effective management of military human resources, enhancing the operational readiness and professional development of Saudi Arabia's defense forces.
